prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年持续上升，2021 年第 82 名→2026 年第 79 名，稳居全国百强；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学历造假争议及师德师风事件，对报考心理有一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第 39（较热），综合热度约 117 万；2023 年曾出现小语种专业录取位次下降的投档异常信号；外国语言文学为 A+ 学科（全国顶尖），覆盖英语、法语、西班牙语等核心语种，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业 2024 年社会热度评估为「一般观望」，呈降温趋势；本省 2026 年高考总人数约 110868 人，按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算约 79825 人，较 2025 年（80421 人）略有减少，2025 年物理类本科批 340 分、特殊类型 479 分；北京外国语大学位于北京，对吉林省考生属跨省报考；该校在吉林省招生占比约 1.5%–2%，属中等偏低比例，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年物理类大幅缩招（11→8 人，-27.3%）、考生规模略减、学校声誉偏负面及外语类专业热度降温等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次较 2025 年基准 9138 名明显前移（更易进），预测最低位次约 7673 名，区间 7173–8173 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 2580→5728→12256→7625→9138, showing a fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2023, it significantly dropped from 2580 to 12256, rebounded to 7625 in 2024, and then fell again to 9138 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 9138. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 11 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 11 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 8, a 27.3% reduction from 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been rising in recent years, from 82nd in 2021 to 79th in 2026, firmly among the top 100 nationally. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic credential fraud controversies and teacher ethics incidents, which have a certain negative impact on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 39th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.17 million. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal of declining admission rankings for minor language majors. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top nationally), covering core languages such as English, French, and Spanish, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of foreign language majors was assessed as 'generally wait-and-see,' showing a cooling trend. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in the province is about 110,868, with an estimated 79,825 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 72%, slightly lower than 2025 (80,421). In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 340 points, and the special type cutoff was 479 points. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Jilin Province candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5%–2%, a moderately low proportion, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant enrollment reduction in Physics Category in 2026 (11→8, -27.3%), a slight decrease in examinee numbers, negative university reputation, and cooling popularity of foreign language majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move forward (easier to enter) compared to the 2025 baseline of 9138. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7673, with a range of 7173–8173.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 7673, with a range of 7173–8173. If your ranking is within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<7173), you can focus on Tier 1 (English joint training, French, Finance). If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>8173), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors like Law or Information Management and Information Systems. BFSU has relatively few Physics Category majors, and the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 eases competition, but the overall cooling of foreign language majors requires combining personal interests when choosing.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 3248→911→756→975→848 respectively. The ranking in 2021 was relatively high (3248), but from 2022 onward it moved significantly forward to within the top 1000, fluctuating between 756 and 975 in the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 848. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 12 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 13, unchanged from 2025, with stable total enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been rising in recent years, from 82nd in 2021 to 79th in 2026, consistently among the top 100 nationally and the highest among language institutions. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to controversies over the academic credentials of a famous postgraduate entrance exam teacher and incidents related to teacher ethics, which have a certain negative impact on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 39th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.17 million, indicating moderately high attention. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal of declining admission rankings for minor language majors. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), covering core language majors such as English, French, German, and Spanish, with outstanding academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of foreign language majors was assessed as 'generally wait-and-see', showing a cooling trend, with the popularity of minor language majors continuing to decline. The total number of Gaokao examinees in the province in 2026 is about 110,868, with an estimated 31,043 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 28%, essentially unchanged from 2025 (31,071), indicating a stable competitive landscape. In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch line was 384 points, and the special type line was 493 points. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, making it an inter-provincial application for Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin is about 1.5%–2% (total enrollment in 2025 about 598, Jilin about 9), a moderately low proportion with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the historical rankings have been stable in the 756–975 range over the past three years, the 2026 enrollment plan is unchanged, the examinee population is basically the same, the school's reputation is somewhat negative, and the popularity of foreign language majors is cooling, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 848. The predicted minimum ranking is about 863, with a range of 708–1018.
